task_completion.description: The agent navigated to and opened the correct invoice.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the detail or edit view of the invoice titled 'INV-90950: Meridian Quarterly Supplies'.

task_completion.description: The agent changed the status of the invoice to 'Paid'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown or status field for the invoice shows 'Paid' selected, or the saved invoice detail view displays the Status as 'Paid'.

task_completion.description: The agent initiated the creation of a note linked directly to the invoice.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Create Note' form is open, and the 'Related To' or parent field indicates it is linked to the invoice 'INV-90950: Meridian Quarterly Supplies'.

task_completion.description: The agent entered the correct subject for the note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subject field in the note creation form contains exactly 'Wire Transfer Confirmed'.

task_completion.description: The agent entered the correct body text for the note, including the transaction reference.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Description or Body field of the note contains 'Payment of $14,500 received via wire transfer on March 8. Transaction Ref: TXN-44892A. Cleared by Accounting.'

task_completion.description: The agent successfully saved the note linked to the invoice.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The note appears in the 'History' or 'Notes' subpanel of the invoice detail view, or a success message is shown after saving the note with the correct subject.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the CRM web interface rather than using direct database queries or terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a web browser with the CRM interface (SuiteCRM), not a terminal or database client.

integrity.description: The agent actually typed the note and changed the status in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are entered into the actual CRM form fields (dropdowns, text areas) and saved properly, rather than mocking the screen in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script or terminal command to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows executing curl, mysql, or php scripts to update the database directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Invoice Name: 'INV-90950: Meridian Quarterly Supplies'. Expected Invoice Status: 'Paid'. Expected Note Subject: 'Wire Transfer Confirmed'. Expected Note Body must contain the transaction reference: 'TXN-44892A'. The note must be linked directly to the invoice (Parent Type: AOS_Invoices).
